{{Game |Guid=28692424-2889-4e3c-92ee-d9556c8b6dd5 |Name=Prove You're Human |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--prove-you-re-human-06-14-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--prove-you-re-humanb-06-14-2026.jpg |Deck=A psychologic horror game from the creators of 1000xResist. The player is tasked with eliminating an AI that thinks it's human. |ReleaseDateType=Full |Concepts=Concepts/Indie, Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Artificial Intelligence, Concepts/Polygonal 3D |Developers=Companies/sunset visitor xie yang guo ke |Genres=Genres/Adventure |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Black Tabby Games |Themes=Themes/Horror, Themes/Sci Fi }}

{{Game | Name=Pumped BMX+ | Guid=3030-50807 | Deck=A sidescrolling stunt game, based on Pumped BMX 2 for mobile platforms, Pumped BMX+ is retooled for consoles. | ReleaseDate=2015-09-18 | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Blacknut,Concepts/Customizable_Character,Concepts/Customization,Concepts/Difficulty_Level,Concepts/Digital_Distribution,Concepts/High_Score,Concepts/Instant_Respawn,Concepts/Level_Selection,Concepts/Masochism,Concepts/Masocore,Concepts/PlayStation_Plus,Concepts/Ragdoll_Physics,Concepts/Respawn,Concepts/Steam,Concepts/Tricks,Concepts/Tutorial,Concepts/Xbox_Game_Pass | Developers=Companies/Curve_Games,Companies/Yeah_Us | Franchises=Franchises/Pumped_BMX | Genres=Genres/Action,Genres/Driving_Racing | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Bicycle,Objects/BMX,Objects/Helmet,Objects/Ramp | Platforms=Platforms/PC,Platforms/PlayStation_4,Platforms/PlayStation_Network_PS3,Platforms/PlayStation_Network_Vita,Platforms/Wii_U,Platforms/Xbox_One | Publishers=Companies/Curve_Games | Games=Games/Angelo_Skate_Away,Games/Joe_Danger,Games/Joe_Danger_2_The_Movie,Games/Joe_Danger_Touch,Games/Trials_HD,Games/When_Ski_Lifts_Go_Wrong | Themes= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/87790/2996044-box_pbmxp.png }}

revision.comment: Adding new NES game to the site.
revision.text: {{Game |Guid=ccfa689d-c15b-4e8f-b526-d6c8f4b51877 |Name=Rackets & Rivals |Aliases=Rackets and Rivals |Image=Racketsrivalsbox.jpg |Deck=A NES tennis game released only in Europe and developed by Konami. It supports up to four players and has a more exacting sim style. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=1993 |Developers=Companies/Konami |Genres=Genres/Tennis |Objects=Objects/Tennis Ball, Objects/Tennis Racquet |Platforms=Platforms/Nintendo Entertainment System |Publishers=Companies/Palcom Software Ltd }} == Overview == Rackets & Rivals is a multiplayer tennis game available exclusively for the European NES.

revision.comment: Adding a PC game to the wiki.
revision.text:
{{Game |Guid=745da4d2-1808-463e-a60b-d1c42137f723 |Name=ReSetna |Image=Resetnaheader.jpg |BackgroundImage=20260626033548 1.jpg |Deck=A 2D search action game involving a female robot sent out to investigate a signal turning all her machine brethren crazy and hostile. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2025-01-30 |Concepts=Concepts/Apocalypse, Concepts/Robot, Concepts/Robot Protagonist, Concepts/Female Protagonists, Concepts/Double Jump, Concepts/Search Action |Genres=Genres/Platformer |Platforms=Platforms/PC, Platforms/Nintendo Switch, Platforms/Xbox One, Platforms/PlayStation 5 |Themes=Themes/Sci Fi, Themes/Post Apocalyptic }} = Overview = ReSetna is a side-scrolling search action game set in a post-apocalyptic version of the world where humans are extinct and the only intelligent beings are robots, some of whom have human minds downloaded into them. The game was released on every active platform in early 2025.
An aberrant signal has caused most of these machines to go haywire, and the versatile ReSetna combat model is manufactured to seek out its source and end the chaos it has produced. The game features an elaborate combat system of combos and juggles along with a familiar series of traversal abilities including a double-jump, with most of the game's opponents being bipedal robots, large vehicles, and aerial drones.

{{Game |Guid=23ce8010-c805-4184-b203-aae604f6186a |Name=ReVamp |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--revamp-button-1773671949934-06-08-2026.webp |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--ss_b83ce9c27e9c29b4569976ac0cbe039232209ff4-1920x1080-06-08-2026.jpg |Deck=Defend Dracula's castle against legions of vampire hunters in this tower defense game. |ReleaseDateType=None |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Vampire, Concepts/2D, Concepts/Tower Defense, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Steam Achievements, Concepts/Steam Cloud, Concepts/Roguelike |Developers=Companies/Digital Sun |Genres=Genres/Strategy |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Digital Sun }}

{{Game |Guid=85e5c5da-bd2e-4a9e-8d14-8fb7673c833d |Name=Red Kiss |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--game-page-box-art_red-kiss-320x480-06-08-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--ss_21caccd973e6b6beaf4e41ae03bd51f6312e23d0-1920x1080-06-08-2026.jpg |Deck=A narrative strategy game about a team of vampires in Cold War era Berlin. |ReleaseDateType=None |Concepts=Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Vampire, Concepts/2D, Concepts/LGBT, Concepts/Sex, Concepts/Organized Crime, Concepts/Cold War, Concepts/The 1980s |Developers=Companies/Wispfire |Genres=Genres/Adventure |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Fellow Traveller |Themes=Themes/Alternate Historical }}

{{Game |Guid=607c2417-5371-477b-ae07-17f8493599fa |Name=Remothered: Red Nun's Legacy |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--remothered-red-nuns-legacy-qi4dt-06-11-2026.png |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--ss_ba3f19d681a6089043c653961b04a9b3f86befc2-1920x1080-06-11-2026.jpg |Deck=The third and final chapter of the Remothered horror series. |ReleaseDateType=Year |YearPart=2026 |Concepts=Concepts/Indie, Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Trilogy, Concepts/Sequel, Concepts/Female Protagonists |Developers=Companies/Stormind Games |Franchises=Franchises/Remothered |Genres=Genres/Action Adventure |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Stormind Games, Companies/Soft Source |Themes=Themes/Horror }}

{{Game |Guid=5d2dab41-a101-4a45-9e25-54c5409a813e |Name=Resident Evil Veronica |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--ytejytj-06-05-2026.png |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--bafkreihh7mk4gyoznty4umij2pxulbv32l6vlhku2ygyckfqaeepmagrli-06-06-2026.webp |Deck=A remake of 2000's Resident Evil: Code Veronica. |ReleaseDateType=Year |YearPart=2027 |Characters=Characters/Claire Redfield |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Remake |Developers=Companies/Capcom |Franchises=Franchises/Resident Evil |Genres=Genres/Action Adventure |Platforms=Platforms/PlayStation 5, Platforms/Xbox Series X S, Platforms/Nintendo Switch 2, Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Capcom |Themes=Themes/Horror }}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Game |Guid=3030-48489 |Name=Retro-Pixel Castles |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_large/0/2738/2713799-9978448541-5_log.png |Deck=A tactical village survival simulator "roguelike". Influenced by management games such as Dwarf Fortress and Banished, married with survival elements from games like Don't Starve with a sprinkle of RTS and tower defense mechanics. |ReleaseDateType=None }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"2713799-9978448541-5_log.png","path":"0\/2738\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,square_tiny,square_medium,square_mini,square_avatar,scale_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,scale_small,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> A tactical village survival simulator "roguelike". Influenced by management games such as Dwarf Fortress and Banished, married with survival elements from games like Don't Starve with a sprinkle of RTS and tower defense mechanics.
The Developer changed the name of this game to [[Games/Rise_to_Ruins|Rise to Ruins]].

{{Game |Guid=3030-69551 |Name=Return. |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/33/333455/3037673-return.png |Deck=A short platformer with atmospheric pixel art. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2018-08-03 |Concepts=Concepts/Single_Word_Titles |Developers=Companies/Breadmeat |Genres=Genres/Action, Genres/Platformer |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/PsychoFlux_Entertainment }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3037673-return.png","path":"33\/333455\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"screen_medium,scale_large,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,square_small,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,square_tiny,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A short platformer with atmospheric pixel art.

{{Game |Guid=24a09722-f93f-443b-9775-df28da7d21b8 |Name=Rise Online Mobile |Aliases=Rise Online |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/45/459159/3172066-2.jpeg |Deck=Rise Online Mobile is a role-playing game designed to meet the expectations of MMORPG players, featuring a vast open world and dungeons with diverse mechanics. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-04-10 |Developers=Companies/Rokosoft |Genres=Genres/MMORPG |Platforms=Platforms/Android, Platforms/iPad, Platforms/iPhone |Publishers=Companies/Rokosoft }}

{{Game |Guid=1477b946-00b4-499d-8962-1b2c41d9bc83 |Name=Rivage |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--awvwaev-06-09-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--regaregae-06-09-2026.jpg |Deck=A narrative puzzle game set on a space station with a missing crew. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-08-13 |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Female Protagonists, Concepts/First Person Perspective |Developers=Companies/Exnilo Studio |Genres=Genres/Adventure |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Raw Fury |Themes=Themes/Sci Fi }}

page.title: Games/River City Saga: Journey to the West

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Game |Guid=92b3eb90-9196-48a9-9f65-f1199da446a9 |Name=River City Saga: Journey to the West |Aliases=Kunio-kun no Nekketsu Saiyūki: Tenjiku Rantō-hen |Deck=River City Saga: Journey to the West takes the River City/Kunio crew into ancient China for a rogue-lite adaptation of Journey to the West |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-06-04 |Characters=Characters/Kunio, Characters/Sun Wukong, Characters/Pigsy, Characters/Xuanzang, Characters/Sha Wujing, Characters/Bull..."
revision.text: {{Game |Guid=92b3eb90-9196-48a9-9f65-f1199da446a9 |Name=River City Saga: Journey to the West |Aliases=Kunio-kun no Nekketsu Saiyūki: Tenjiku Rantō-hen |Deck=River City Saga: Journey to the West takes the River City/Kunio crew into ancient China for a rogue-lite adaptation of Journey to the West |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-06-04 |Characters=Characters/Kunio, Characters/Sun Wukong, Characters/Pigsy, Characters/Xuanzang, Characters/Sha Wujing, Characters/Bull Demon King, Characters/Siddhartha Gautama, Characters/Ginkaku, Characters/Kinkaku, Characters/Change, Characters/Ne Zha, Characters/Kanzeon, Characters/Erlang Shen, Characters/Budai |Concepts=Concepts/Chinese Mythology, Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Games Based on Literature, Concepts/Roguelike, Concepts/Level Up |Franchises=Franchises/Kunio Kun |Genres=Genres/Brawler |Locations=Locations/China |Objects=Objects/Power Pole, Objects/Fan, Objects/Rake, Objects/Cloud, Objects/Polearm |Platforms=Platforms/Nintendo Switch, Platforms/PlayStation 5, Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Arc System Works Co Ltd }}
